meaning: n.朝圣者,游方僧,[昆](＝palmerworm)毛虫(尤指北美的小舌麦蛾幼虫)
examples: "The elm trees are all dying," said Palmer, with a sad shake of his head.
One of my friends, named Anna Palmer, is always using the latest fitness gadgets.
Edmund Spenser in The Faerie Queene does not bring Sir Guyon with his palmer through the cave of Mammon.
On the other end of the spectrum is 78-year old golfing legend Arnold Palmer.
"Trying to get back in the swing of things, " said Palmer, who lives in nearby Colleyville.
